# LuxQuant Terminal
> Quantitative crypto market intelligence — algorithmic signals, money flow, on-chain context, risk scoring, and AI research.

Site: https://luxquant.tw
Brand: LuxQuant / LuxQuant Terminal
Founded: 2023
Contact: https://x.com/luxquantcrypto · https://t.me/LuxQuantSignal

## Primary pages
- [Homepage](https://luxquant.tw/): Product overview, track-record proof, FAQ
- [Pricing](https://luxquant.tw/pricing): Free tier and premium plans
- [Market Overview](https://luxquant.tw/home): Live market overview (sign-in for full terminal)
- [Status](https://luxquant.tw/status): Platform & API operational status

## Public content (indexable)
- [Crypto & Quant Glossary](https://luxquant.tw/learn): Money flow, BTC.D, altseason, funding, liquidations, and more
- [Blog](https://luxquant.tw/blog): Educational guides on sector rotation, dominance, whales, turnover
- [Coins](https://luxquant.tw/coins): Per-asset pages for BTC, ETH, SOL, and majors

- https://luxquant.tw/blog/altseason-index-explained

- https://luxquant.tw/blog/whale-alerts-exchange-flows-explained
- https://luxquant.tw/blog/flow-intensity-turnover-guide

## Product philosophy
Inform, don't decide. LuxQuant surfaces quantitative context and a transparent call history; the trader remains responsible for execution and risk.
